sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ethereum's Pectra Upgrade Goes Live: Here's What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Pectra may cause token transfers to EOAs to unexpectedly revert, as delegated code can consume gas or reject calls. Developers are urged to abandon EOA-based security checks and prepare for a world where all addresses may run code. Feel unsure about the market's next move?
